topicDefinition.oneLiner: Create viral-worthy videos that get millions of views. Optimized for maximum engagement and shares.
boundaries: Must focus on features that drive virality (hooks, B-roll, pacing, trendy captions, Virality Scores).
Must support fast social formats (TikTok, Reels, Shorts).
Excludes generic video editors that lack algorithmic/viral optimization features.

howToChoose.title: Look for Virality Scoring
howToChoose.desc: Top tools analyze your long-form video and score clips based on hook strength, pacing, and trend potential to predict social performance.

howToChoose.title: Check Auto-Captioning Styles
howToChoose.desc: Viral content relies heavily on dynamic, animated 'Hormozi-style' captions. Ensure the tool offers high-accuracy text with customizable, trendy fonts.

howToChoose.title: Evaluate B-roll and Reframing Features
howToChoose.desc: The tool should automatically insert relevant B-roll to maintain viewer retention and smartly reframe horizontal speakers into a vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

sources.title: The 12 Best AI Video Creation Tools for Viral Content in 2026
sources.excerpt: A list of tools specifically optimized for short-form platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

sections.heading: Top Platforms for Short-Form Viral Content
sections.content: Hooked stands out specifically for short-form platforms, offering trend-driven workflows with real-time trend intelligence. GEN.pro functions as an all-in-one influence engine with a Large Social Model for predictive trend analysis.

keyClaims: 30-day strategy roadmap to guide viral content creation
proofSnippets: Hooked stands out specifically for short-form platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, offering trend-driven workflows with real-time trend intelligence.

toolMentions.bestFor: Creators and agencies building at scale
keyClaims: Large Social Model for predictive trend analysis
proofSnippets: GEN.pro functions as an all-in-one influence engine with a Large Social Model for predictive trend analysis... starts at $99/month.

notes: Focuses heavily on predictive virality and social AI features.

sources.title: Best Video Editing Tools 2025: AI Clippers & Repurposing Suites
sources.excerpt: A deep dive into tools that turn long-form content into viral clips with automated captions and virality scores.

sections.heading: Top Contenders
sections.content: OpusClip is one of the most popular tools for converting long-form videos into viral short-form clips. It automatically identifies engaging moments and generates a Virality Score. Vizard focuses on highlight discovery, vertical video reframing, and text-based editing.

toolMentions.bestFor: Repurposing long videos into viral shorts
keyClaims: Generates fully captioned clips with a Virality Score to predict performance
pricingClaims: Pricing starts at $15/month for individual creators
limitations: Works best with talking-head videos, not action-heavy content
proofSnippets: OpusClip is one of the most popular tools for converting long-form videos into viral short-form clips.

keyClaims: Focuses on highlight discovery and vertical video reframing
Handles auto-subtitles and translation for global publishing
pricingClaims: Offers both free and paid tiers
proofSnippets: Vizard focuses on highlight discovery, vertical video reframing, and text-based editing that works like editing a document.

notes: Vizard and Opus Clip are the core heavyweights in the 'viral clipper' space.

sources.title: Vizard.ai Official Pricing
sources.excerpt: Official details on Vizard's limits, watermarks, and pricing.

sections.heading: Pricing Plans
sections.content: Free: $0/month (60 credits/month). Creator: Paid tier with 600+ credits/month. Business: Paid tier for teams.

sections.heading: Export Quality and Watermarks
sections.content: Free plan includes watermark and 720p maximum export. Paid plans offer 4K export and no watermark.

watermarkRules: Creator & Business plans include no watermark
exportRules: Free plan limited to 720p and 10-minute maximum length
limitations: API rate limits: 3 requests per minute, 20 requests per hour
proofSnippets: Free: $0/month (60 credits/month, 720p export). Free plan includes watermark.

sources.title: Munch Payment and Cancellation Policy
sources.excerpt: Official terms regarding Munch's refund and cancellation policies.

sections.heading: Refund Policy
sections.content: You will not receive a refund for the month of your cancellation; however, your subscription access will continue for the remainder of the current monthly billing period.

refundRules: No refunds for the month of cancellation; access continues until the end of the billing cycle
Must notify customer service at least 3 business days before billing period ends to prevent renewal
proofSnippets: You will not receive a refund for the month of your cancellation; however, your subscription access will continue for the remainder of the current monthly billing period.
